description: FLAT garment compatibility rules — domain logic separated from rendering code

necktype_compat.description: Which neckType values are allowed for each neckShape. null = all allowed.

variant_necktype_compat.description: Which neckType values are allowed for each shoulderType. null = all allowed.

detail_necktype_compat.description: Which neckType values are allowed for each neckDetail. null = all allowed.

variant_detail_compat.description: Which neckDetail values are allowed for each shoulderType. null = all allowed.

collar_compat.description: Which collarType values are allowed for each neckShape, grouped by collarGroup.

variant_collar_override.description: shoulderType that further restricts collar options (intersection with collar_compat). null = no override.
variant_collar_override._note: __blocked__ means collar neckType itself is blocked at Level 1 (variant_necktype_compat), so collar never reached.

sleeve_compat.description: Sleeve shape and cuff compatibility based on sleeve length.

functional_rules.description: Allowed neckType = intersection of neckShape compat, shoulderType compat, and neckDetail compat. If current neckType is blocked, auto-switch to 'finish'.
Variant restricts which neckDetail values are allowed. If current detail is blocked, auto-switch to 'none'.

When neckType='collar', allowed collarTypes = collar_compat[neckShape][collarGroup] ∩ variant_collar_override[shoulderType][collarGroup]. If current collarType is invalid, auto-switch to first valid in same group, or first valid in any group.
functional_rules.condition: neckType === 'collar' && collarType not in allowed set
functional_rules.action: collarType → first valid option; if no valid in current group, switch collarGroup too

functional_rules.description: If a collarGroup has zero allowed collarTypes for the current neckShape+variant, the entire group button is disabled.
Halter, off-shoulder, one-shoulder variants force sleeveless. All other sleeve length buttons disabled.
When variant is 'none', re-enable all sleeve length buttons.
When sleeveless (length <= 2), all sleeve shapes are disabled. Auto-switch to 'straight'.
When short sleeves (length <= 20), long-only shapes are disabled. Auto-switch to 'straight' if current shape is blocked.
When sleeveless (length <= 2), all cuff options are disabled. Auto-switch to 'plain'.
Halter/off-shoulder/one-shoulder blocks all closures (button, zip, snap, hidden).
Kangaroo pocket blocks zipper closure.
Double-breasted requires a lapel collar (notched/peaked/shawl/convertible) AND a closure AND not kimono sleeve type.
Oversized/boxy fit (fitW >= 75) blocks all dart types.
Crop length (bodyLen < 20) blocks large pocket types.
Zip closure blocks kangaroo pocket.
Crop length (bodyLen < 20) blocks side-slit and hi-lo hem shapes.
Kimono sleeve type cannot be sleeveless. Auto-switch to cap length.
When garmentType is 'top' and bodyLen >= 70, suggest switching to Dress.
When garmentType is 'top' with oversized fit and tailored collar or closure, suggest switching to Outerwear.
When garmentType is 'dress' and bodyLen < 55, suggest switching to Top.
When garmentType is 'outerwear' with slim fit, no tailored collar, and no closure, suggest switching to Top.
functional_rules.condition: garmentType === 'outerwear' && fitW < 50 && effectiveFinish not in lapel_collars && closure === 'none'

en.closureOff: Closure removed — this neckline looks best without one.
en.closureZipOff: Zipper removed — doesn't pair well with kangaroo pocket. Try buttons?
en.dartOff: Dart removed — oversized fits look great without darts.
en.pocketOff: Pocket removed — too small for this pocket at crop length.
en.kangarooOff: Kangaroo pocket removed — doesn't work with zipper closure.
en.hemReset: Hemline adjusted — this style works better with a straight hem.
en.kimonoSleeve: Kimono sleeves need some length — set to cap.
en.sleevelessForced: Set to sleeveless — this neckline style requires it.
en.doubleOff: Switched to single — double breast needs a lapel collar + closure.

ko.closureOff: 클로저 해제 — 이 넥라인은 그냥이 더 예뻐요.
ko.closureZipOff: 지퍼 해제 — 캥거루 포켓이랑 안 맞아요. 버튼은 어때요?
ko.dartOff: 다트 해제 — 오버사이즈 핏은 다트 없이도 잘 어울려요.
ko.pocketOff: 포켓 해제 — 크롭이라 이 포켓이 안 들어가요.
ko.kangarooOff: 캥거루 해제 — 지퍼 클로저랑 안 맞아요.
ko.hemReset: 헴라인 조정 — 이 스타일은 스트레이트가 더 자연스러워요.
ko.kimonoSleeve: 기모노 소매는 길이가 필요해요 — 캡으로 설정했어요.
ko.sleevelessForced: 민소매로 변경 — 이 넥라인 스타일이 요구해요.
ko.doubleOff: 싱글로 변경 — 더블브레스트는 라펠 칼라+클로저가 필요해요.

shoulder_sleeve_block.description: shoulderType values that block certain sleeveType values. Hard rule — physically impossible.

strap_neck_block.description: strapType values that block certain neckShape values. Hard rule — structural conflict.

sleeve_cuff_block.description: sleeveType values that block certain sleeveCuff values. Soft rule — unconventional.

hem_finish_shape_block.description: hemFinish values that block certain hemShape values. Soft rule — aesthetically incompatible.

double_breast_shoulder_block.description: shoulderType values that block closureStyle=double. Hard rule.
